member.name: T:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder
member.summary: A builder class for configuring ReactiveUI without using reflection. This provides an AOT-compatible alternative to the reflection-based InitializeReactiveUI method.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.#ctor(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,Splat.IReadonlyDependencyResolver)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.HasBeenBuilt
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this instance has been built.
member.value: true if this instance has been built; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.UsingBuilder
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the application builder is being used.
member.value: true if using the application builder; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.CreateSplatBuilder
member.summary: Creates a Splat builder with the Splat Locator instance using the current mutable resolver.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.ResetBuilderStateForTests
member.summary: Resets the builder state for tests, ONLY if the builder is being used in a unit test environment.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.UseCurrentSplatLocator
member.summary: Direct the builder to use the current Splat Locator (Locator.CurrentMutable) for subsequent registrations. This is useful when configuring an external container (e.g., Autofac, DryIoc, Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection) as the Splat dependency resolver prior to applying ReactiveUI registrations.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.UsingModule``1(``0)
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.WithCustomRegistration(System.Action{Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver})
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.WithCoreServices
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.AppBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds and applies all registrations to the dependency resolver.

member.name: T:Splat.Builder.SplatBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Common extension helpers for registering Splat modules.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.SplatBuilderExtensions.Apply(Splat.Builder.IModule)
member.summary: Runs the provided configuration action immediately against the current Splat Locator.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.SplatBuilderExtensions.CreateSplatBuilder(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver)
member.summary: Creates a Splat application builder using the specified dependency resolver.
member.param: The mutable dependency resolver to use.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.SplatBuilderExtensions.CreateSplatBuilder(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Action{Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver})
member.summary: Creates a Splat application builder using the specified dependency resolver and applies a configuration action.
member.param: The mutable dependency resolver to use.
